subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God and the God of all names, my Creator and the Creator of the heavens! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و اله الاسماء و خالقی و خالق السماء اسئلک بنور وجهک بعد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @praise and encouragement
